name: type:lesson
description: Learner-facing lesson content in Korean, English, and Japanese

name: type:curriculum
description: Curriculum structure, learning path, prerequisites, or next-step work

name: type:glossary
description: Terminology and glossary entries across languages

name: type:workflow
description: Spec Kit, Codex, GitHub Actions, or repository workflow work

name: type:docs
description: Project documentation, README, or process documentation

name: type:bug
description: Incorrect behavior, broken workflow, or invalid generated artifact

name: agent:codex
description: Issue is intended for Codex agent work

name: agent:claude
description: Issue is intended for Claude agent work

name: trigger:speckit-auto
description: Issue should be handled by the $speckit-auto workflow

name: mode:gated
description: speckit-auto gated mode; ask before implementation, commit, or PR

name: mode:auto-implement
description: speckit-auto may implement low-risk slices after analysis passes

name: mode:auto-pr
description: speckit-auto may implement, validate, commit, push, and open a draft PR

name: mode:auto-stack-pr
description: speckit-auto may implement validated slices and publish them as stacked draft PRs with gh-stack

name: relationship:parent
description: Parent issue for linked speckit-auto sub-issues

name: relationship:sub-issue
description: Sub-issue created from a broader speckit-auto parent issue

name: phase:intake
description: speckit-auto intake phase

name: phase:slicing
description: speckit-auto slicing phase

name: phase:scheduling
description: speckit-auto scheduling phase

name: phase:specify
description: Spec Kit specify phase

name: phase:clarify
description: Spec Kit clarify phase

name: phase:checklist
description: Spec Kit checklist phase

name: phase:plan
description: Spec Kit plan phase

name: phase:tasks
description: Spec Kit tasks phase

name: phase:analyze
description: Spec Kit analyze phase

name: phase:implement
description: Spec Kit implement phase

name: phase:review
description: Review phase for lesson, workflow, or PR quality

name: phase:integration
description: Cross-slice integration and consistency phase

name: phase:token-reporting
description: Token observability and reporting phase

name: phase:commit
description: Commit phase after validation and review pass

name: phase:pr-creation
description: Draft PR creation phase

name: lang:ko
description: Korean canonical source content

name: lang:en
description: English localized content

name: lang:ja
description: Japanese localized content

name: priority:P1
description: Highest-priority learner or workflow value

name: priority:P2
description: Medium-priority learner or workflow value

name: priority:P3
description: Lower-priority learner or workflow value

name: risk:low
description: Low risk change

name: risk:medium
description: Medium risk change

name: risk:high
description: High risk change requiring explicit review

name: risk:critical
description: Critical blocker or release-stopping issue

name: status:blocked
description: Blocked by missing decision, failing gate, or unresolved dependency

name: status:queued
description: Queued for Codex speckit-auto work

name: status:in-progress
description: Codex is actively working on this issue

name: status:needs-clarification
description: Needs learner, scope, terminology, safety, or workflow clarification

name: status:needs-sub-issues
description: Issue should be split into linked sub-issues before implementation

name: status:ready
description: Ready for the next Spec Kit or content workflow phase

name: status:waiting-review
description: Implementation or workflow output is ready for review

name: status:done
description: Requested speckit-auto terminal action is complete

name: status:failed
description: speckit-auto workflow failed and cannot continue without intervention
